error_signature: Supabase realtime not updating the frontend
title: Supabase realtime updates not reflecting on frontend
symptom: Changes made in the Supabase editor do not reflect on the Weweb frontend without a manual refresh.
applies_when: Using Supabase with Row level security
Realtime option is checked for all tables
not_this_if: Changes are visible in the Supabase dashboard
Realtime updates are working in other parts of the application
root_cause: The issue arises when the 'Enable Realtime' option is not activated in the Supabase settings, preventing updates from being pushed to the frontend in real-time.
fix_steps: Log in to your Supabase dashboard
Navigate to the settings for your project
Find the 'Enable Realtime' option and activate it
Save the changes and test the updates in Weweb
agent_instruction: Activate the 'Enable Realtime' option in your Supabase settings.
